name: Breakfast Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon ground red pepper flakes, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Cool meat to 32-35°F.
2. Grind through a 3/16" plate and place in a mixing bowl.
3. Add all ingredients (including water) and mix well.
4. Stuff into 28-30mm hog casings.
5. Place in refrigerator as soon as possible.
6. Chill well and package as desired.
